activated_rules.rule_name: Letter of Credit (LC) exception not activated
General goods description with invoice reference

consignor.certificate_value:
Volvo Bus Corporation
Bussgatan 1
SE-50464, Borås
Sweden
consignor.invoice_value:
VOLVO BUS CORPORATION
SE-405 08 Göteborg
Sweden
consignor.motivation: Consignor 'Volvo Bus Corporation' from Sweden in the certificate matches the issuer of the invoice exactly after normalization of legal form and address differences (Borås vs Göteborg). The name and country are explicitly found in the invoice header and footer (after normalization). No contradictions found according to rules 4.1.0 and 4.1.3.6.

consignee.certificate_value:
MANUFACTURING COMMERCIAL VEHICLES M
MCV
Km 24 Cairo Ismailia Desert Road
El-Obour City
Cairo
Egypt
consignee.invoice_value:
Manufacturing Commercial Vehicles
KM 24, Cairo-Ismailia Road,
00000 CAIRO
Egypt
consignee.motivation: Consignee in the certificate matches consignee in the invoice by name and address after normalization (minor spacing and capitalization differences), and the country Egypt matches exactly. Consignee is found under explicit consignee field in invoice. No contradictions detected.

goods_description.certificate_value:
8x40FLATRACK,  6x40HC,  1x40 REEFER
MEDUUX802256
Volvo CKD Chassis (B0E) BERLA79
See attached invoice SEC9001242 and SEC9001241 dated 20260219
goods_description.motivation: Certificate contains a general goods description with explicit invoice references 'SEC9001242' and 'SEC9001241' and invoice dates matching those in the invoice. Per 4.3.5, this general description is accepted as verified with invoice matching. The invoice lists the chassis as 'CHASSIS(B0E)BERLA79' matching the certificate's description. No article numbers needed for matching as allowed by 4.3.5.

quantity.invoice_value:
Gross: 74221  Net: 62816 (Invoice SEC9001241)
Gross: 10604  Net: 8974 (Invoice SEC9001242)
Total weight [KG]: 74221 (Invoice SEC9001241)
Total weight [KG]: 10604 (Invoice SEC9001242)
quantity.motivation: Certificate indicates 84825 KG GW in quantity field. The invoice pair consists of two separate invoices SEC9001241 and SEC9001242 with gross weights 74221 KG and 10604 KG respectively, totaling 84825 KG. The total gross weight sum matches certificate quantity exactly within tolerances, fulfilling rule 4.4.5.2 for summation of multiple invoices. Weight units and categories are explicit and consistent.

origin.motivation: Certificate origin is Sweden and invoice origin field indicates 'SE', the standard ISO code for Sweden, which normalizes to 'Sweden'. Both match expressly in a dedicated country of origin field, fulfilling rules for land normalization including the equivalence of country codes and names.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All key control points match; consignor, consignee, goods description, quantity and origin in the certificate correspond exactly to the invoice data after normalization and allowed rules.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Samtliga kontrollpunkter stämmer väl. Avsändare, mottagare, varubeskrivning, kvantitet och ursprungsland i certifikatet överensstämmer med fakturans uppgifter. Dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
